info.name: Kasookoo SDK Backend - Complete API Collection
info.description: Kasookoo SDK Backend API. SDK JWT: run Authentication > Create Client Session, then use sdk_access_token and sdk_session_id. Most routes use Authorization: Bearer {{sdk_access_token}}; organization-scoped routes also send X-Organization-Id when the JWT has no organization_id. SIP call routes (make, dial, end, hangup) use the same SDK JWT. Optional STATIC_API_KEY (static_api_key) remains in variables for legacy or non-SDK tests if you add such routes. Modules: auth, WebRTC, SIP (/api/v1/sip), notifications, messaging, associated-numbers, CDR, dashboard, monitoring.

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Obtain a Kasookoo SDK JWT (max ttl_seconds 600 per API). Tests script saves sdk_access_token and sdk_session_id for refresh/revoke and scoped routes.
Returns decoded claims for the Bearer SDK JWT (debug).
Public keys for verifying RS256 SDK tokens. No authentication.
POST with Bearer current SDK JWT; session_id in path must match token sid claim.
Marks the session inactive. Bearer token must be for the same session.

item.description: SDK auth: client-sessions mints JWTs; introspect and session refresh/revoke are under /api/v1/sdk/auth. JWKS is served at /.well-known/jwks.json (app root, not under /api/v1).

item.name: WebRTC - Call Management

request.description: Issue a basic LiveKit room token. No Authorization required.
Caller token with user lookup and optional push. Requires valid SDK JWT (no scope list enforced beyond session).
Same caller flow as get-caller-token; requires scope webrtc:token:create.
Anonymous caller; requires SDK JWT. Optional called_user_id or admin email from env.
Generate LiveKit access token for caller and initiate call session
Generate LiveKit access token for called user
End an active call session
Get current call status and recording information

Debug snapshot: active room keys and participant_to_room map. Requires valid SDK JWT (authenticate_sdk_user). For paginated call history with filters, use CDR > List Call Sessions (GET /api/v1/cdr/sessions).
List all active calls
Reject an incoming call
Notify callee and tear down room when caller ends before connect. No Authorization in API (matches backend).

item.description: WebRTC call APIs. Token and call lifecycle routes use SDK JWT with scopes (webrtc:token:create, webrtc:call:read, webrtc:call:end). Reject / caller-end do not require Authorization in the current backend.

request.description: Start recording without call context (standalone recording)
Get recording status and information
Stop a standalone recording
Download a recorded call file
Handle LiveKit webhook events

item.name: SIP - Call Management

request.description: Initiate an outbound SIP call. Requires Kasookoo SDK JWT (Authorization: Bearer {{sdk_access_token}}). Run Authentication > Create Client Session first, or paste a token into the sdk_access_token collection variable.
Same outbound behavior as make; uses SDK JWT (authenticate_token), same as other /sip/calls/* routes.
End an active SIP call. Requires Kasookoo SDK JWT (sdk_access_token).
Same end behavior as End SIP Call; uses SDK JWT (authenticate_token).

item.description: SDK SIP call management (/api/v1/sip). make, dial, end, and hangup all require Kasookoo SDK JWT (sdk_access_token).

item.name: SIP - Room & Token Management

request.description: Generate LiveKit access token for joining a SIP room. Requires Kasookoo SDK JWT (sdk_access_token).
List configured SIP trunks. Requires Kasookoo SDK JWT (sdk_access_token).

item.description: SDK SIP room and token helpers. Both requests require SDK JWT.

item.name: SIP - System & Health

request.description: Health check for the SDK SIP bridge. No authentication.
SDK SIP API index (route list). No authentication.
LiveKit webhook receiver for SIP (Authorization must match LiveKit webhook signing; set livekit_webhook_auth). Body in Postman is illustrative; LiveKit sends signed payloads.

item.description: SDK SIP system routes: health and root are open; LiveKit webhook uses LiveKit authorization header.

item.name: CDR - Call Detail Records
item.description: Organization-scoped call session listing and CSV export. Requires SDK JWT + X-Organization-Id (or org in JWT).

header.description: Tenant id (or rely on organization_id claim in SDK JWT)

request.description: Paginated CDR with optional search, caller_id, callee_id, kind, status, date_from, date_to, date_field.

header.description: Tenant id (or rely on organization_id claim in SDK JWT)

request.description: Same filters as list; returns UTF-8 CSV with BOM.

header.description: Tenant id (or rely on organization_id claim in SDK JWT)

request.description: Optional date_from, date_to (ISO or YYYY-MM-DD), date_field in created_at|started_at|ended_at.

item.description: Persistent messaging; SDK JWT + X-Organization-Id. send/get-token need messaging scopes.

item.name: Notifications - Device Token Management

request.description: Register a device token for push notifications. Uses SDK JWT (client-sessions), not static_api_key.
Update an existing device token for push notifications. Uses SDK JWT (client-sessions), not static_api_key.
Unregister a device token to stop receiving push notifications. Uses SDK JWT (client-sessions), not static_api_key.

item.description: Device token management for push notifications

item.name: Organizations
item.description: Organization CRUD and SIP trunk settings management.

item.name: Monitoring - Prometheus & System Metrics

request.description: Get Prometheus metrics in Prometheus format for scraping
Basic health check endpoint
Detailed system status with comprehensive metrics in JSON format
Get metrics in JSON format for programmatic access
